description:
Global code review findings covering architecture, implementation correctness,
error handling, type safety, accessibility, performance, and build infrastructure.

Areas covered:
- integral-core: validation, error handling, code duplication
- integral-wasm: boundary safety, error propagation, memory efficiency
- web frontend: type safety, MIDI robustness, accessibility, performance
- build infra: CI/CD, cross-platform, Nix pinning
title: Code review: reliability, consistency, and maintainability improvements
